title: Stardom's Flora
description: A mod that adds more flowers and plants to the game!
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77d005e5779a0fb4e24547adb52c2b827b4a4908.png)

Stardom's Flora is a mod that adds plenty of new flowers to the gam. Currently the mod contains the following flowers:
- White Rose
- Bluebell
- Lavender
- Marigold
- Camellia
- Ghost Orchid
- Frostblossom
- Soul Lily
- Void Lily

The mod also adds the Florist Villager and the Florist Table. The Florist Villager sells all vanilla flowers and dyes as well as this mod's flowers. The Florist Villager's workstation is the Florist Table. The Floorist Table can be obtained by combining any flower with a crafting table and is used to combine modded flowers into a dye mixture (Bluebell + Camellia = 2 Purple Dye). This table can also be found in villages in the floral houses.
